mapper.sql:
SELECT A.SRVY_ID , A.SRVY_CTGRCD , A.SRVY_TMPLT_CD , A.SRVY_TMPLTYN , A.ORG_ID , A.SRVY_TTL , A.SRVY_CTS , A.SRVY_TYCD , A.JOIN_TRGT , A.SRVY_SDTTM , A.RESCH_END_DTTM , A.RSLT_OPEN_TYCD , A.MRK_INQYN , A.DVCLAS_REGYN , A.QSTN_COPYYN , A.ITEM_COPY_RESCH_CD , A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.MRK_RFLTRT , A.MRK_OYN , A.EXTD_PTCPYN , A.EXTD_EDTTM , A.EVL_CTGRCD , A.USEYN , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , COUNT(A.SRVY_ID) OVER() AS totalCnt
, (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID) AS SBJCT_ID
, B.SBJCT_ID , (SELECT COUNT(A.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N') AS reschTotalUserCnt , (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT AA.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' WHERE AA.SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND BB.AUDITYN = 'N') AS reschJoinUserCnt , (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' WHERE AA.SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND AA.EVLYN = 'Y' AND BB.AUDITYN = 'N') AS reschEvalCnt , B.GRPCD AS declsGrpCd
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN WHERE RESCH_PAGE_CD IN (SELECT RESCH_PAGE_CD FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_PAGE WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID)) AS reschQstnCnt , CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.SRVY_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '대기' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.SRVY_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 <= 0 AND (TO_DATE(A.RESCH_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '진행' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXTD_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '진행' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.RESCH_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 THEN '완료' END AS reschStatus
, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID and USER_ID = #{userId}) AS joinYn , NVL((SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = #{userId}), '0') AS SCR
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA WHERE AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ( ( SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(A.JOIN_TRGT,',',numbers.n),',',-1) FROM ( SELECT 1 n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 ) numbers WHERE CHAR_LENGTH(A.JOIN_TRGT) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(A.JOIN_TRGT, ',' ,'')) >= numbers.n-1 ) )) AS homeReschTotalUserCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID WHERE A.USER_AUTHRT_ID REGEXP REGEXP_REPLACE(A.JOIN_TRGT, ',', '|')) AS homeReschJoinUserCnt
FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A
INNER JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SRVY_TMPLTYN = 'N'
AND A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd}
AND LOWER(A.SRVY_TTL) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue}))
AND A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y'
AND FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.SRVY_SDTTM AND A.RESCH_END_DTTM
AND A.SRVY_TYCD = #{reschTypeCd}
AND LOWER(A.JOIN_TRGT) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{joinTrgt}) || '%' COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci
AND A.SRVY_CTGRCD = #{reschCtgrCd}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ReshDAO.select 설 명 : 설문 조회 */

/* SQL ID : ReshDAO.list 설 명 : 설문 리스트 조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.SRVY_SDTTM, A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS lineNo , A.* FROM (
) A ORDER BY A.SRVY_SDTTM DESC, A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

/* SQL ID : ReshDAO.listMyCreCrsResh 설 명 : 내 강의에 등록된 설문 리스트 조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY C.SRVY_ID DESC) AS lineNo , C.SRVY_ID AS reschCd , C.SRVY_TTL AS reschTitle , D.SBJCT_ID AS creYear , D.CRS_ID AS creTerm , D.SBJCTNM AS crsCreNm , F.SMSTRNM AS termNm FROM SBJCT_PROF A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY C ON C.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND C.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON D.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN E ON E.SBJCT_ID = D.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN CRS_SMSTR F ON F.CRS_SMSTR_ID = E.CRS_SMSTR_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{rgtrId} ORDER BY C.SRVY_ID
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : ReshDAO.updateReshCreCrsDelYn 설 명 : 설문 삭제 상태로 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN SET DELYN = 'Y' WHERE SRVY_ID = #{reschCd}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ReshDAO.selectScoreViewReshCount 설 명 : 강의에 연결된 설문중에서 설문에 참여해야 성적을 조회할수 있도록 설정한 설문의 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN A JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.MRK_INQYN = 'Y'
AND B.SRVY_ID != #{reschCd}

/* SQL ID : ReshMapper.listReshCreCrsDecls 설 명 : 설문과 같이 등록된 분반 또는 다른 과목 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID AS creCrsCd , C.SBJCTNM AS crsCreNm , C.SBJCT_ID AS creYear , C.CRS_ID AS creTerm , A.SRVY_ID AS reschCd , B.SRVY_TTL AS reschTitle , A.GRPCD AS grpCd FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN A JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN AA WHERE AA.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} AND AA.GRPCD = A.GRPCD AND AA.SRVY_ID != A.SRVY_ID )

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.selectEvalJoinCheck 설 명 : 강의평가/만족도조사 설문 참여가능 여부 체크 */ SELECT IF(FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.SRVY_SDTTM AND A.RESCH_END_DTTM, 'Y', 'N') AS RESCH_DATE_YN , IF( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = #{userId} ) , 'Y', 'N' ) AS STD_YN , IF( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = #{userId} ) , 'Y', 'N' ) AS JOIN_YN FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SRVY_TMPLTYN = 'N' AND A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND A.SRVY_TYCD = #{reschTypeCd} AND A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd}

/* SQL ID : ReshDAO.listReshScoreAply 설 명 : 성적 반영 설문 목록 */ SELECT A.SRVY_ID , A.SRVY_TTL FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.SRVY_TYCD = 'LECT' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y'
